# Bidwell Consulting

> Independent software consulting practice of Jordan Winters, based in Minneapolis, MN, serving the Minneapolis-St. Paul (Twin Cities) metro in person and clients everywhere remotely. Over a decade of engineering, infrastructure, and engineering-practice leadership. You work directly with Jordan - no account managers, no handoffs.

## Services

- [Software Consulting](https://bidwell.info/services/software-consulting): Architecture, cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP, Terraform, containers), and 0-to-1 platform builds - hands-on, code included.
- [AI Consulting & Agent Engineering](https://bidwell.info/services/ai-consulting): LLM integration, custom AI agents, and coding-agent workflows, from a consultant who works this way daily.
- [Engineering Practice Improvement](https://bidwell.info/services/engineering-practice-improvement): DevOps, agile delivery, and developer productivity - measured by lead time and change-failure rate, not ceremony.
- [Tech Career Coaching](https://bidwell.info/services/career-coaching): 1-on-1 coaching for software engineers and tech professionals - resumes, interviews, transitions.

## About

- [About Jordan Winters](https://bidwell.info/about): Background, beliefs, and how the practice works.
- [Contact](https://bidwell.info/contact): Free 30-minute discovery call; email jordan@bidwell.info or LinkedIn.

## Writing

- [Agent Coordination Structure](https://bidwell.info/blog/agent-coordination): A practical structure for coordinating AI coding agents - critical directives, artifact handoffs, and personas.
